description: Britain's Duchess Kate Middleton sparked off the nude shoe trend. Understated and classy, these shoes from catwalk replicate the nude look for the Indian diva, in a low cut classic Mary Jane. Wear this with tonal double pleated formal trousers and an understated colour happy shirt. You can also wear this with capris and tops.UpperSynthetic leather upper with slip on stylingPerforations on the forefoot and midfoot for breathabilityElasticated strap across the midfoot for enhanced grip, with synthetic leather patterned overlayReinforced overlays on the midfoot and heel region with stitch detailing for durabilityPull loop for ease of wearingUpper glued to the outsole for optimal comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with textured patterning on the forefoot and heelUpraised heel for styleShoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
